social_environment: Upbeat, energetic, and heavily influenced by Greek life and Division I Big 12 athletics. Football games are central to fall social life. The student body is generally described as welcoming, spirited, and relatively politically conservative compared to coastal peers.
transportation_impact: Located in a suburban setting about 4 miles from downtown Fort Worth, the 302-acre campus is highly walkable. Fort Worth provides a booming job market and excellent internships in the DFW metroplex.
research_impact: Classified as an R2: Doctoral University with High Research Activity, TCU spent approximately $24 million on research in 2023. Undergraduates frequently secure research opportunities early, especially in the College of Science & Engineering.
